    Deprecated API

    Contents

    • Methods
    • Deprecated Methods
      Method
      Description
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.BooleanVariable.getValue()
      Please use BooleanVariable.getValueAsBoolean() instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.BooleanVariable.setValue(Boolean)
      Please use BooleanVariable.setBooleanValue(boolean) instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.ByteVariable.getValue()
      Please use ByteVariable.getValueAsByte() instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.ByteVariable.setValue(Byte)
      Please use ByteVariable.setByteValue(byte) instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.CharVariable.getValue()
      Please use CharVariable.getValueAsChar() instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.CharVariable.setValue(Character)
      Please use CharVariable.setCharValue(char) instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.DoubleVariable.getValue()
      Please use DoubleVariable.getValueAsDouble() instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.DoubleVariable.setValue(Double)
      Please use DoubleVariable.setDoubleValue(double) instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.FloatVariable.getValue()
      Please use FloatVariable.getValueAsFloat() instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.FloatVariable.setValue(Float)
      Please use FloatVariable.setFloatValue(float) instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.IntVariable.getValue()
      Please use IntVariable.getValueAsInt() instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.IntVariable.setValue(Integer)
      Please use IntVariable.setIntValue(int) instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.LongVariable.getValue()
      Please use LongVariable.getValueAsLong() instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.LongVariable.setValue(Long)
      Please use LongVariable.setLongValue(long) instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.ShortVariable.getValue()
      Please use ShortVariable.getValueAsShort() instead.
      net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.ShortVariable.setValue(Short)
      Please use ShortVariable.setShortValue(short) instead.
